name: com.figma/figma-mcp
title: Figma
description: Read Figma design files, variables, components, and Dev Mode metadata. Figma's official hosted MCP with OAuth.

byoClient.guide:
Figma's MCP server requires you to register your own OAuth integration in the Figma developer portal - their public DCR endpoint returns 403 (entitlement-gated). You must hold a **paid Dev seat or Full seat** on at least one Figma team for OAuth to succeed.

**1.** Open **figma.com/developers/apps** and sign in. Click **Create new app**.

**2.** Fill in:
  - **App name**: any (e.g. *Wayland MCP*)
  - **Website**: any (e.g. `https://localhost`)
  - **Callback URL**: paste the URL Wayland shows below.

**3.** Click **Save**. Figma displays your **Client ID** and **Client Secret** - copy both.

**4.** Paste the Client ID and Secret below.

**Heads up:** if your Figma account is on the free Starter plan, the OAuth handshake will fail at Figma's end with `Insufficient plan`. Upgrade to a paid Dev or Full seat first.

scopes.name: mcp:connect
scopes.plainLanguage: Connect Wayland to your Figma account so it can read design files and Dev Mode metadata.
